textPlain: Title has a typo, it should be “Radio Garden”

Anyone got a few international favorites? Alright, I'll startOroko Radio / Accra, Ghana / https://radio.garden/listen/oro-radio/pmCVm8TsFIP Radio / Paris, France / https://radio.garden/listen/fip/YNeGA5ua
This reminds me of the good Internet that was.
I think this was posted shortly before the 2022 invasion of Ukraine. I remember the night before the invasion listening to a station right by the border, remarking on how normal the radio was.
